TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Quri_mseasug_uqun, title = Quri_mseasug_uqun, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Quri_mseasug_uqun} }

S.FORM: quri mseasug uqun Mangal samat ka Truku seuxal o seasug na ltlutut. Kmrut tnbgan ka 1 ruwan sapah o sgun dha bitaq laqi rbnaw. Mshkil ka kuyuh o prbangan peeniq 2 pniqan. Lupung pnaah thiyaq o qdalun malu uqun. Mseupu muda mqaras ka akang o hmlama ka duma, msinaw masu ka duma, duri ni bitaq kmrut babuy ni kacing.
S.PHON: quɾi msəasug uqun maŋal samat ka tɾuku səuxal o səasug na ltlutut. kmɾut tnbgan ka * ɾuwan sapaħ o sgun dħa bitaq laqi ɾbnaw. msħkil ka kujuħ o pɾbaŋan pəəniq * pniqan. lupuŋ pnaaħ tħijaq o qdalun malu uqun. msəupu muda mqaɾas ka akaŋ o ħmlama ka duma, msinaw masu ka duma, duɾi ni bitaq kmɾut babuj ni kaʦiŋ.
S.FORM: quri mseasug uqun Mangal samat ka Truku seuxal o seasug na ltlutut. Kmrut tnbgan ka 1 ruwan sapah o sgun dha bitaq laqi rbnaw. Mshkil ka kuyuh o prbangan peeniq 2 pniqan. Lupung pnaah thiyaq o qdalun malu uqun. Mseupu muda mqaras ka akang o hmlama ka duma, msinaw masu ka duma, duri ni bitaq kmrut babuy ni kacing.
S.PHON: quɾi msəasug uqun maŋal samat ka tɾuku səuxal o səasug na ltlutut. kmɾut tnbgan ka * ɾuwan sapaħ o sgun dħa bitaq laqi ɾbnaw. msħkil ka kujuħ o pɾbaŋan pəəniq * pniqan. lupuŋ pnaaħ tħijaq o qdalun malu uqun. msəupu muda mqaɾas ka akaŋ o ħmlama ka duma, msinaw masu ka duma, duɾi ni bitaq kmɾut babuj ni kaʦiŋ.
